title: Party Essentials N102030 20-Count Printed Hard Plastic 10-Ounce Tumblers/Party Cups, Fleur De Lis, Clear
features: Package of 20 crystal clear hard plastic 10-ounce party cups with a beautiful fleur de Lis design
Cups are ideal for any cold beverage and also make great impromptu snack cups
Classic barware styling; hand washable; reusable; disposable for quick after party clean-up
Complete your special occasion table with Fleur de Lis 9 oz. party cups and 2 oz. shot glasses
From dinnerware, cutlery and cups to serve ware, table covers and more, Party Essentials is the perfect choice for beautifully and affordably entertaining family and friends
description: The last thing you want is to run out of drink ware at a party, which is why Northwest Enterprises is committed to offering quality party essentials with a great look at an affordable price. Northwest Enterprises' Party Essentials brand crystal clear 10-ounce quality hard plastic party cups feature a beautiful fleur de Lis design and a classic barware silhouette; they're perfect for a wide variety of cold beverages and, in a pinch, they make great little snack cups. The glasses may be hand washed and reused or simply disposed of for super-fast cleanup. So, whether it's a wedding, Mardi Gras party, simple neighborhood get together or everyday use, Party Essentials from Northwest Enterprises is simply brimming with ways to beautifully and affordably entertain family and friends. Northwest Enterprises is a traditional family company with more than 25 years of experience in party supplies and food service disposables. Through their dedication to the high quality of their products and services, Northwest Enterprises' Party Essentials brand continues to earn a reputation as a leader in the industry and the trust and loyalty of its customers.
